mechanism: Fiscal deficits are the single cause producing both effects: earnings support (via Kalecki-Levy identity flowing ~$400-600B to corporate profits) and term premium elevation (via $2T+ Treasury issuance). The two effects operate on different timescales — earnings support is immediate while term premium rebuilds over quarters.
regime_dependence: Holds as long as deficits remain elevated (>4.5% GDP) and the central bank is not absorbing net issuance. Neutralized under large-scale QE as demonstrated by Japan.
